flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cerritos College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.0k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cerritos College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cerritos College rose 34% between 2007 and 2010 (15.4k → 20.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cerritos College rose 25% between 2007 and 2010 (18.6% → 23.1%).
